title: Cluckshrooms
description: Adds the Cluckshroom from Minecraft Earth and Minecraft Dungeons.
body:
Adds the Cluckshroom mob from Minecraft Earths and Minecraft Dungeons. These chicken-like mobs spawn in the `minecraft:mushroom_fields` biome like Mooshrooms and they can spawn on top of blocks defined by the `#wich:cluckshrooms_spawnable_on` tag [default the same as the `#minecraft:mooshrooms_spawnable_on` tag]. Cluckshrooms can be lured and bred with items in the `#wich:cluckshroom_food` tag [default the same as the `#minecraft:chicken_food` tag]. Cluckshrooms can be sheared, dropping mushrooms of their respective type (Red or Brown). Cluckshrooms periodically lay eggs based on their type and may generate mushrooms when in the dark or on mycelium. A Cluckshroom that is struck by lightning will change type, just like a Mooshroom. Cluckshroom eggs can be used in the place of chicken eggs in most recipes. Baby zombies can mount Cluckshrooms using the same mechanics as Chicken Jockeys. Russian translations courtesy of [256smash](https://github.com/256smash)
Simplified Chinese translations courtesy of [Bishop-06](https://github.com/Bishop-06)
Ukranian translations courtesy of [StarmanMine142](https://modrinth.com/user/StarmanMine142)
